Meta.title: Notkode — Custom AI-powered technology
Meta.description: AI-powered internal systems, intelligent agents, automations and custom digital products. Development for companies and agencies.

Nav.agentesAutomacaoDesc: Chatbots, virtual assistants and n8n integrations
Nav.produtosDigitaisDesc: SaaS, mobile apps, websites and e-commerce
Nav.designDesc: Logo, palette, typography and complete brandbook

Home.heroDescription: Your business grew, but the technology didn't keep up. Notkode builds what you really need — the way your business actually works.
Home.showcaseDesc: Centralize CRM, automation, AI and dashboards in a single solution built around your process.
Home.feature1Desc: Made for the way you work, not adapted from a generic template.
Home.feature2Desc: An intelligent assistant trained on your data, clients and processes.
Home.feature3Desc: No platform subscription. It's your code, on your server.
Home.feature4Desc: Start small and expand without rebuilding from scratch.
Home.caseProblem: SMB owners were losing hours on manual WhatsApp service, unable to scale without hiring.
Home.caseSolution: We built an AI agent creation SaaS that automates customer service and frees the human team.
Home.caseQuote: Notkode was fundamental to optimize the entire customer journey and develop the ideal software to overcome our challenge.
Home.servicesDesc: From internal systems to mobile apps — we deliver technology that solves real problems.
Home.serviceSistemasDesc: A system built for the way you work, with AI that knows your business.
Home.serviceAgentesDesc: Bots that handle clients, organize orders and eliminate repetitive tasks.
Home.serviceProdutosDesc: Apps, stores, platforms and sites — from first client to growth.
Home.serviceDesignDesc: Complete brandbook: logo, palette, typography and brand applications.
Home.processDesc: A simple process that takes your idea from paper to reality.
Home.process1Desc: We understand how you work today and where technology makes the most difference.
Home.process2Desc: We choose the right solution and map the fastest path to results.
Home.process3Desc: You track progress every week and watch the product take shape.
Home.process4Desc: We launch together and keep evolving based on what the data shows.
Home.testimonial1Quote: Notkode was essential for the rapid launch of my project. From the first contact, I received exceptional attention. Highest quality, technique, agility and seriousness. Highly recommend!
Home.testimonial2Quote: Notkode was fundamental for launching ZapInside. In three weeks we were already receiving our first client. Highly recommend for all entrepreneurs!
Home.testimonial3Quote: Everything was very professional and we were able to quickly transform ideas into reality. I am very happy with the result.
Home.testimonial4Quote: Very attentive service, always with logical and efficient counterpoints. The project was delivered on time and the quality was perfect. I recommend with full confidence.
Home.testimonial5Quote: Notkode was fundamental in optimizing the entire customer journey and developing the ideal software to help us overcome our challenge.
Home.agencyTitle: Multiply your revenue with white-label dev
Home.agencyDesc: Offer development and AI to your clients without hiring a team. Notkode works behind the scenes.
Home.finalCtaTitle: Let's build something that is yours.
Home.finalCtaDesc: Free diagnosis, no strings attached. In 30 minutes you walk away with a clear plan.
Home.finalCtaMeta: Reply within 24h · No card · No strings
